title: Redo Announces $81 Million Series B to Support Commerce Technology Expansion
body: Draper, Utah, June 23, 2026
Series B financing announcement
Commerce technology platform

title: Agenda
body: Financing details and valuation
Current platform adoption
Strategic funding priorities
AI-driven product development
Network infrastructure capabilities
Acquisition and international expansion

title: Series B Financing Details
body: $81 million Series B financing
$1.25 billion valuation
Round led by Smash Capital
Participation from existing investors Pelion Venture Partners and Cervin Ventures

title: Platform Adoption Metrics
body: More than 4,100 brands use the Redo platform today
Over 1,750 merchants use multiple Redo offerings across the suite
Demonstrates cross-platform engagement and product suite adoption

title: Mission and Strategic Vision
body: Every merchant is fighting to own the relationship with their shoppers, said Sterling Snow, co-founder and CEO
This funding allows us to accelerate that mission
Build the infrastructure brands need to own shopper relationships

title: Investor Perspective on Market Opportunity
body: Redo started by building trust with merchants through post purchase experiences, said Paul Szurek of Smash Capital
Has expanded into a much larger opportunity
Validation of platform evolution beyond initial product

title: AI-Driven Commerce Tools Development
body: New capital will fund development of AI-driven commerce tools
Product roadmap focused on personalization and automation
Three distinct AI product initiatives planned

title: Agentic Shopping Experiences
body: Agentic shopping experiences tailored to individual shoppers
AI agents designed to personalize the shopping journey
Focus on individual customer customization

title: Marketing Agent Platform
body: Marketing agent for personalized email and text campaigns
Automated personalization across communication channels
Designed to enhance merchant-customer engagement

title: Post-Purchase Concierge Service
body: Post-purchase concierge service designed to increase customer lifetime value
Focus on retention and value maximization after initial purchase
Extension of post-purchase experience foundation

title: Returns Network Infrastructure
body: Our network allows customers to return products locally, said Aaron Evett, chief commerce officer
We can inspect, refurbish, re-fulfill, and reship inventory
Local returns processing creates operational efficiency and inventory recovery

title: ReturnBear Acquisition
body: Redo announced the acquisition of ReturnBear
Extends returns servicing coverage to more than 100 countries
Significantly expands international returns infrastructure

title: International Expansion Plans
body: Plans for international expansion of merchant network
Global scaling strategy alongside ReturnBear acquisition
Extends platform availability beyond domestic market

title: Strategic Outlook
body: Funding supports transition from post-purchase specialist to comprehensive commerce platform
International expansion and AI development as dual growth drivers
Network effects from returns infrastructure and multi-product adoption
